name: The Violet Wolves
description:
The Violet Wolves are all Princesses who have been united by faith and tragedy with various lands been lost to demonic invasions. The Miyn palace stands a beacon of hope against the demons with the survives of the lost Northern and Western lands rallying under Empress Luceria. Luceria wasting no time made, Emeralia, Roxanne and Sheryl part of her official harem and they fight beside her against the demons. Their goal is to reclaim their lost lands and crush the demons while they live for combat they will take time out to test new people they meet for their cause. Several of the them can have their own desire for consorts, concubines and Luceria is very excited to claim people who she desires.

 

The cast!

Empress Luceria – Violet Rose – A headstrong woman leading the battle with her rapier, magical shields and devastating magic. She is the leader, the head of the harem of women who adore her and they work together to fight demons and lead Luceria’s arm as the tip of the spear.

Art by - Dark_Horizon_25

The Empress's Heavenly Princesses.
Princess Emeralia – Lavender Rose – A cold and calculating woman who is an expert in large area spell casting, she is skilled in magic and a teacher if you are lucky enough. She is one of the survivors of the lost Kingdom of Scarlet. She was saved by Luceria and has sworn her allegiance and her love for Luceria.

Princess Roxanne – Blue Rose – Roxanne is the Kingdom of Edelleland ruler, her kingdom was hit hard by the demons and she found herself and Iris under the protection of Luceria and her army. Roxanne wishes to reclaim her home and follow Luceria in life and love. She is a Shield maiden with magical shields and healing skills.

Art by LokokaBoosTer69

Sheryl Takeko -Cyan Rose)- Is a Princess of a demon-war-shattered empire, chained in Viotoxica's lightless dungeon amid writhing horrors. No hero came—she forged her own escape with blazing magical blades, leaving nightmares shrieking in her wake. Rescued by Empress Luceria, this voluptuous survivor now graces the Violet Wolves harem as alchemist and blade-dancer, her golden eyes promising elixirs... and thrills.
((Drawn by me, character based off Sheryl from Viotoxica - an old porn game.))

Miyn Palace – The Violet Citadel

Location: Capital City of Elaris, Eledant Empire

Architecture: Gothic-fantasy spires fused with crystalline violet enchantments.

Exterior:

  • A massive obsidian fortress wrapped in living violet
creator: Liz Fitzsimons
